name: Flow
description: A modern, feature-rich YouTube client for Android built with Jetpack Compose
readme_summary: Flow is an open-source Android YouTube client built with Jetpack Compose, offering a privacy-focused experience. It features an on-device recommendation engine called FlowNeuro, which learns user preferences without sending any data off the device, ensuring user privacy and personalized content discovery.
key_features: Privacy-focused, no tracking or accounts needed
Dedicated music player with synchronized lyrics
primary_use_case: To provide a feature-rich, privacy-respecting YouTube and YouTube Music client for Android with personalized, on-device recommendations.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, friendly robot sitting comfortably on a couch, holding a tablet displaying a YouTube-like interface. The robot is actively 'learning' by observing small, glowing data streams flowing from the tablet directly into its head, representing the on-device recommendation engine. Around the robot, subtle visual cues like a 'privacy shield' icon and a 'no tracking' symbol are visible. The background is a clean, modern living room with soft lighting. Small, abstract data visualizations float gently in the air, hinting at the underlying technology. The repository name 'Flow' is subtly integrated into the robot's design or a nearby object. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette, emphasizing user control and personalized experience.

name: windows11
description: 🪐 Perfect Windows 11: A Portal to Windows 11 Settings, Optimizations, and Scripts
readme_summary: Perfect Windows 11 is a configurable batch script designed to optimize Windows 11 by enhancing privacy, tuning system services, improving performance, and applying various user-defined tweaks. It offers a safe and reversible approach to system customization, with all changes being optional and logged.
key_features: Privacy Hardening (disable telemetry, ads, data collection)
Advanced Options (group svchost, enable legacy boot menu)
primary_use_case: Optimizing and customizing Windows 11 for improved privacy, performance, and user experience through a script-based interface.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled mechanic in a clean, modern workshop meticulously tuning a sleek, futuristic Windows 11 computer. The mechanic is using a set of glowing, digital tools to adjust various dials and levers representing system settings like privacy, performance, and gaming. Input data streams in as raw, unorganized code, and the output is a perfectly optimized, streamlined computer emitting a soft, clean glow. Small, holographic UI elements displaying 'ON/OFF' toggles and 'APPLY' buttons float around the scene. The overall mood is one of precision and control, with a bright, clean aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clear, defined lines and a vibrant, tech-focused color palette.

name: autoresearch
description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically
readme_summary: This repository enables autonomous AI agents to conduct LLM training experiments overnight. By modifying Python training scripts and instructions based on performance metrics, the agents aim to iteratively improve model performance without human intervention.
key_features: Autonomous AI agents for LLM training experiments
Validation bits per byte (val_bpb) as the primary metric
primary_use_case: To automate and accelerate the iterative process of LLM training and hyperparameter tuning through AI agents.
cover_image_prompt: A diligent robotic librarian meticulously organizing and updating an ever-growing library of books. Each book represents a version of an LLM model. The librarian consults glowing digital scrolls (representing `program.md` instructions) and uses a specialized tool to 'edit' the spine of a book, instantly updating its content. Books that show improved content glow brighter. Small screens around the librarian display 'val_bpb' scores and progress charts. The scene is a futuristic, clean library with soft, ambient lighting, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clear iconography and subtle digital particle effects.

name: frame
readme_summary: Frame is a high-performance, native GUI application for FFmpeg media conversion, built with Tauri, Svelte, and Rust. It offers a user-friendly interface for converting video, audio, and image files with granular control over encoding parameters, including hardware acceleration and AI upscaling.
key_features: Supports video, audio, and image conversion
Extensive output format and encoder support (H.264, H.265, VP9, AV1, ProRes, AAC, MP3, FLAC, etc.)
Hardware acceleration support (Apple VideoToolbox, NVIDIA NVENC)
Built with Tauri v2, Svelte 5, and Rust
primary_use_case: Providing a fast and user-friendly graphical interface for complex FFmpeg media conversion tasks on desktop operating systems.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, representing the 'Frame' application, stands at a workbench. In front of them, a jumble of raw, unrefined media files (like a tangled film reel, a distorted audio wave, and a pixelated image) are being fed into a sleek, modern machine. The machine, subtly branded with 'Frame', emits streams of perfectly formed, high-quality output files (a crisp video file, a clear audio waveform, and a sharp image) into organized bins. The background shows a clean, organized workshop with subtle UI elements hinting at conversion settings and progress bars. The overall mood is efficient and precise, showcasing the transformation from chaos to order. 3D isometric illustration style, vibrant yet clean color palette, high detail.

name: Vane
description: Vane is an AI-powered answering engine.
readme_summary: Vane is an open-source, privacy-focused AI answering engine that allows users to self-host their searches. It integrates with various LLM providers, including local Ollama models and cloud services, to deliver accurate, cited answers while maintaining user privacy.
key_features: Support for multiple AI providers (local LLMs via Ollama, OpenAI, Claude, Groq, Gemini)
Customizable search sources (web, discussions, academic papers)
UI Widgets for quick lookups (weather, calculations, stocks)
File uploads for Q&A (PDF, text, images)
primary_use_case: To provide users with a private, self-hosted AI-powered search and answering engine that leverages local or cloud-based LLMs.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, old librarian sits at a grand, ornate desk in a cozy, dimly lit study, surrounded by shelves of ancient books and glowing digital screens. In front of the librarian is a large, open tome displaying a question. From the tome, streams of light and digital particles flow outwards, transforming into clear, concise answers with small, glowing citation markers. On one screen, a local LLM model (represented by a small, stylized brain icon) is actively processing information, while another screen shows connections to cloud AI providers. The repository name 'Vane' is subtly etched into the desk. The scene should be rendered in a warm, inviting digital painting style with a focus on the transformation of raw information into structured knowledge.
